answer:
For dynamic similarity in incompressible flow with the same fluid and temperature, the Reynolds number must match.  
The Reynolds number depends on velocity and characteristic length, so \( V_p L_p = V_m L_m \).  
Given \( V_p = 88 \, \text{ft/s} \), \( L_p = 27 \, \text{ft} \), and \( V_m = 264 \, \text{ft/s} \), we have \( L_m = \frac{88 \times 27}{264} = 9 \, \text{ft} \).  

\boxed{A}
